title: wrong scoping for cross-schema view references
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE s1 (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE s2 (id Int32, description String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now()) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE s3 (x Int32 CHECK (x > 0), y Float64 DEFAULT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY x;
SELECT * FROM s3 WHERE x IN (SELECT id FROM s1 WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: cross-schema view references with incorrect scoping
